attacks.name: Scratch and Draw
attacks.text: If any Stadium card with Holon in its name is in play, draw a card.

attacks.name: Deceive
attacks.text: Your opponent chooses 1 of his or her Pokemon. Put 4 damage counters on that Pokemon.

tests.name: scratch_draw_with_holon_stadium
tests.description: Test Scratch and Draw draws a card with Holon Stadium

tests.name: deceive_damage_counters
tests.description: Test Deceive places 4 damage counters on opponent's choice
